tasks.summary: Create reference implementation for core KPI functions
tasks.description:
Create tests/finance_reference.py with independent reference implementations of:
- ref_noi(income, expenses)
- ref_cap_rate(noi, price)
- ref_cash_on_cash(cash_flow, invested)
- ref_dscr(noi, debt_service)
- ref_monthly_mortgage(principal, annual_rate, years)
- ref_one_percent_rule(rent, price)
- ref_gross_rent_multiplier(price, annual_rent)
- ref_annual_depreciation(purchase_price, land_value)

Each function is a second implementation from the mathematical formula, not a copy of the production code. Uses pure Python Decimal math (no numpy, no Django).

acceptance_criteria.description: Reference values validated against hand-calculated examples

tasks.summary: Write parameterized test suite (50+ edge cases)
tasks.description:
Create tests/test_finance_math.py with @pytest.mark.parametrize tests covering:
- NOI: 8 cases (zero income, zero expenses, negative, extreme, precision)
- Cap rate: 8 cases (zero price, zero NOI, negative, 1/1000000)
- Cash-on-cash: 8 cases (zero investment, negative cash flow)
- DSCR: 8 cases (zero debt service, NOI < debt, ratio > 3)
- Mortgage: 10 cases (zero P, zero r, 0-year, negative r, 30-year)
- 1% rule: 6 cases (exact 1%, 0.99%, 1.01%, zero, currency)
- GRM: 6 cases (zero rent, negative, extreme, precision)
- Depreciation: 6 cases (zero land, land > purchase, 27.5 boundary)

Each test compares production function to reference function with Decimal('0.01') tolerance.

acceptance_criteria.description: Every test case compares prod vs ref with abs(diff) < Decimal('0.01')
Edge cases cover zero, negative, extreme, precision, boundary, currency
All tests pass: python -m pytest tests/test_finance_math.py -v

tasks.summary: Add financial math gate to CI workflow
tasks.description: Add a 'finance-math' job to ci-quality.yml that runs pytest tests/test_finance_math.py. Add it to the pr-gates-pass needs list and failure check.

tasks.summary: Add Makefile target for financial math verification
tasks.description: Add 'test-finance-math' target to Makefile that runs the verification suite.

acceptance_criteria.description: Target passes when all tests pass, fails otherwise

tasks.summary: Document mathematical formulas in production KPI docstrings
tasks.description:
Update the docstrings of all 8 core KPI production functions to include:
1. The mathematical formula in plain-text math notation
2. Variable definitions for each parameter
3. Reference to industry standard source

This ensures any future developer or AI agent can understand the derivation without reading the implementation.

acceptance_criteria.description: cap_rate() docstring contains 'Cap Rate = Annual NOI / Purchase Price'
dscr() docstring contains 'DSCR = Annual NOI / Annual Debt Service'
calculate_monthly_mortgage() docstring contains the amortization formula
gross_rent_multiplier() docstring contains 'GRM = Purchase Price / Annual Rent'
annual_depreciation() docstring contains '27.5-year straight-line for residential'
